title: Automate the update of a Text Column
excerpt:
I am trying to automate the process of inputting the Board Name into a column when a status changes - is this possible? 
Whilst I would prefer a text column, I do not mind what type of column it is, so long as it can be …

posts.author: river821 (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to automate the process of inputting the Board Name into a column when a status changes - is this possible?

Whilst I would prefer a text column, I do not mind what type of column it is, so long as it can be matched with another item name (ie. Text) within a secondary automation.

As far as I am aware, automations are not capable of updating a text column. And formulas don’t have the {board name} as an option.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @river821 - sadly I dont know of a way to do this out of the box in monday, however you could create a simple Integromat scenario to complete this.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since this topic still gets quite a few views:

You can solve this with Automato’s “set text column to value” automation:

You can substitute the board name, and also item name and values.
